features.title: What is AI Resume Analyzer?
features.paragraph1: AI Resume Analyzer is an advanced career tool that uses artificial intelligence to evaluate your resume and provide actionable feedback. Whether you're a recent graduate or an experienced professional, our platform helps you optimize your resume for Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and human recruiters.
features.paragraph2: Simply upload your resume in PDF format, and our AI will analyze it within seconds. You'll receive detailed insights on your resume's strengths, areas for improvement, keyword optimization, formatting suggestions, and an overall score to track your progress.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered Analysis
aiPowered.description: Advanced algorithms analyze every aspect of your resume

atsOptimization.title: ATS Optimization
atsOptimization.description: Ensure your resume passes applicant tracking systems

actionableTips.title: Actionable Tips
actionableTips.description: Receive specific suggestions to enhance your resume

howItWorks.question: How does the AI Resume Analyzer work?
howItWorks.answer: Our AI analyzes your resume content, structure, and formatting to provide instant feedback on strengths, areas for improvement, and ATS optimization suggestions. It evaluates factors like keyword usage, formatting consistency, section organization, and industry best practices.

isFree.question: Is the resume analyzer free?
isFree.answer: Yes! We offer a free plan with {{freeRequests}} resume analyses per day. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited analyses and advanced features like detailed keyword analysis, comparison tools, and priority support.

fileFormats.question: What file formats are supported?
fileFormats.answer: We support PDF file format for resume analysis.

howQuick.question: How quickly will I receive my analysis?
howQuick.answer: Analysis is typically completed within 30-40 seconds after upload. You'll see your results instantly on the screen, including your overall score, strengths, areas for improvement, and specific recommendations.

home.title: AI-Powered Resume Analyzer
home.subtitle: Get instant AI-powered insights to improve your resume and land more interviews
